metas.name: Mahouka Koukou no Rettousei: Yotsuba Keishou-hen
metas.description:
Genres: Action, Romance, Sci-Fi, Supernatural Tags:Magic/Male Protagonist Movie adaptation of Mahouka Koukou no Rettousei's Yotsuba Succession Arc.

The invitation has arrived. It is time for the New Year’s Reception at the Yotsuba family residence. This year, Miyuki and other candidates will gather there to decide who will be the next leader of their powerful clan. If chosen as the successor, she would never have to see her brother live as a pariah ever again. At the same time, such a position surely entails a political marriage, plunging her mind into complete turmoil. Complicating matters, the current head of their family sows doubt with the shocking claim that Miyuki is not Tatsuya’s sister. When the new year comes, their relationship may be changed forever...

(Source: Yen Press)

metas.name: Saishuu Gakushou Hibike! Euphonium - Zenpen
metas.description:
Genres: Drama, Music, Slice of Life Tags:Band/Female Protagonist/Coming of Age/Classical Music/School Club/School/Primarily Teen Cast/Primarily Female Cast The music isn’t over yet!

“Sound! Euphonium, The Final Movie” is coming in 2026!

metas.name: Mononoke: Hebigami
metas.description: Genres: Fantasy, Horror, Mystery, Psychological, Supernatural Tags:Historical/Youkai/Cosmic Horror The third movie in the Mononoke movie trilogy.

metas.name: Love Live! Hasunosora Jogakuin School Idol Club: Bloom Garden Party
metas.description:
Genres: Music, Slice of Life Tags:Idol/Female Protagonist/Primarily Female Cast/Full CGI/Dancing/Ensemble Cast The Bloom Garden Party is finally here. It’s the stage where everyone will “someday, surely” bloom—the goal Kaho and the others have been chasing for a whole year. This is the first step.

The long-awaited day has finally arrived — the day when the promise they made with the graduates will come true. It was also the last day for the 103rd-year students, on the verge of graduation, could spend with their friends as students of Hasunosora.

―Even so, the girls race through their “youth” with all their might. This is the story of girls who struggled to bloom, a tale of dreams made real together.

(Source: Love Live! Hasunosora Jogakuin School Idol Club: Bloom Garden Party Site, translated)

metas.name: Meitantei Conan: Highway no Datenshi
metas.description: Genres: Mystery Tags:Detective/Police/Crime The 29th Detective Conan movie.

metas.name: Shin Keroro Gunsou Movie: Fukkatsushite Sokkou Chikyuu Metsubou no Kiki de Arimasu!
metas.description:
Genres: Comedy, Sci-Fi Tags: The Keroro Platoon, living their lazy days as if invasion were nothing. Then one day, they face a series of bizarre phenomena erupting across the nation. Feeling a sense of crisis, the Keroro Platoon rises up, staking their pride as invaders! What is the meaning of the mysterious symbols they encounter wherever they go. The largest-scale battle in the history of "Sgt.Frog" begins in the Reiwa era!

(Source: Crunchyroll News, edited)

Note: Relations are provisional and will be updated when more info is announced.

metas.name: Entotsu-machi no Poupelle: Yakusoku no Tokei-dai
metas.description:
Genres: Fantasy Tags: Sequel to Entotsu-machi no Poupelle.

After losing his friend Poupelle, young Lubicchi wanders into a mysterious realm where a clock in a tower is frozen at 11:59. To return home, he must restart it – and find the courage to believe again.

(Source: Berlin International Film Festival)

metas.name: Kujira wo Yumemu
metas.description:
Genres: Drama Tags:Graduation Project/Female Protagonist Graduation work of Shuzuku.

A girl wanders through a landscape of quiet ruin, alone except for her dog and a mysterious voice on her radio, reciting poems at a precise hour every day. A haunting memory of a nearby future.

(Source: Fantasia International Film Festival)

Notes:
- Selected and pre-screened at the Fantasia International Film Festival as a part of the Anime no Bento official selection on July 19, 2025.
- Won the Grand Prix at the Kochi Anime Creator Award 2025 out of 30 nominated works.
